title: Restricted Funds Accounting: Structure and Services — D-RED Seminar Slides (Copeland)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-03-09 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Restricted Funds Accounting: Structure and Services' presented by Jeffrey Copeland. Describes the structure and services of MSU's Restricted Funds Accounting (RFA) function, which manages the financial ledger side of sponsored awards.
